title: Recent survey papers on alignment evaluation

papers.title: Benchmark suites for instruction-following robustness
papers.summary: Catalogues 9 public benchmarks and proposes a composite alignment score.

papers.title: Red-teaming workflows for enterprise copilots
papers.summary: Documents a repeatable human+automated red-team loop for production assistants.

keyFindings: Composite scores reduce false confidence when single benchmarks disagree.
Human review remains necessary for policy-violation classes with low base rates.
